name: ℜ𝔞𝔡𝔞𝔠𝔬𝔫, 𝔗𝔥𝔢 ℭ𝔥𝔞𝔬𝔱𝔦𝔠

sheet.name: ℜ𝔞𝔡𝔞𝔠𝔬𝔫, 𝔗𝔥𝔢 ℭ𝔥𝔞𝔬𝔱𝔦𝔠
sheet.background_story:
What was once a lost soul, blindly worshiping Mother Agora, is now a man with no faith to either of The Two.
Radacon, The Chaotic, was but an alter ego who wanted nothing more than to be free to wreak havoc.
Once he was contacted through what he first believed to be Nightmares he was given the strength to take the reigns and banish DieAnotherDay to the realm of the dead.
He now receives visions from The Crow of Detriti guiding him down the path he was destined to take. Chaos
